detail.description: Details of the detected risk. Note: Details for this property are only available for Workload Identities Premium customers. Events in tenants without this license will be returned hidden.

riskEventTypes.description: The type of risk event detected. The possible values are: investigationsThreatIntelligence, generic, adminConfirmedServicePrincipalCompromised, suspiciousSignins, leakedCredentials, anomalousServicePrincipalActivity, maliciousApplication, suspiciousApplication.
